Terse and pithy. Describe the behavior change and what drives it — not a
walkthrough of the code. The diff already shows *what the code does*; this
explains *what changes for users and why*. Delete these comments as you fill in.
-->

## What

<!-- High-level description of the behavior change, in a line or two. -->

## Why

<!-- The driver: the impact of this change and what motivated it. -->

## Additional info

Optional — usually omit, and delete this heading when you do. Only for something
